summary: Core version-bumper.ts is clean and well-typed. Workflow issues: (1) Bun installed via curl-pipe-bash instead of `oven-sh/setup-bun`; (2) `actions/checkout@v4` tag-pinned not SHA-pinned; (3) actionlint validation step runs last instead of first. Major DRY violation: 4 near-identical 12-line test-case steps (workflow lines ~20–65) should use a matrix strategy. run-act-tests.ts has redundant assertions (PASS markers + ASSERTION PASSED check the same outcome twice).
